+{"id":"bd-pwjkr","title":"Review & merge PR #1013: fix(validation) hyphenated prefixes","description":"Review and merge PR #1013: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1013

## Summary
Fixes ValidateIDFormat to support hyphenated prefixes like 'bead-me-up-3e9'. Uses utils.ExtractIssuePrefix instead of naive first-hyphen splitting.

## Changes
- internal/validation/bead.go - Use ExtractIssuePrefix 
- internal/validation/bead_test.go - Add comprehensive test cases

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Pull the branch locally
- [ ] Run tests: go test ./internal/validation/...
- [ ] Verify hyphenated prefix tests pass
- [ ] Merge with gh pr merge 1013 --repo steveyegge/beads --squash","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-11T18:14:25.726482-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-11T18:14:25.726482-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-pzw7","title":"gt handoff deadlock at handoff.go:125","notes":"When running 'gt handoff -m "message"' after successful MR submit, go panics with 'fatal error: all goroutines are asleep - deadlock\!' at handoff.go:125. The shutdown request still appears to be sent successfully but the command crashes. Stack trace shows issue is in runHandoff select statement.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-19T23:22:12.46315-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T17:51:25.817355-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T17:51:25.817355-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-q13h","title":"Makefile Integration for Benchmarks","description":"Add a single 'bench' target to the Makefile for running performance benchmarks.

Target:
.PHONY: bench

bench:
	go test -bench=. -benchtime=3s -tags=bench \
		-cpuprofile=cpu.prof -memprofile=mem.prof \
		./internal/storage/sqlite/
	@echo ""
	@echo "Profiles generated. View flamegraph:"
	@echo "  go tool pprof -http=:8080 cpu.prof"

Features:
- Single simple target, no complexity
- Always generates CPU and memory profiles
- Clear output on how to view results
- 3 second benchmark time for reliable results
- Uses bench build tag for heavy benchmarks

Usage:
  make bench                              # Run all benchmarks
  go test -bench=BenchmarkGetReadyWork... # Run specific benchmark","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-13T22:23:25.922916-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-14T08:55:17.620824-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-14T08:55:17.620824-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-q13h","depends_on_id":"bd-zj8e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-11-13T22:24:06.371947-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
